scripts.test: pnpm run image:build && pnpm run image:test
scripts.format:shell: shfmt -w bootstrap.sh setup-nvim.sh .devcontainer/install.sh scripting/*.sh bin/tmux-lazygit-return bin/new-tmux-session bin/tmux-sessionizer bin/tmux-lazygit
scripts.lint:shell: shellcheck -s bash scripting/*.sh && shellcheck bootstrap.sh setup-nvim.sh bin/tmux-lazygit-return bin/new-tmux-session bin/tmux-sessionizer bin/tmux-lazygit
scripts.check:shell: shfmt -d bootstrap.sh setup-nvim.sh .devcontainer/install.sh scripting/*.sh bin/tmux-lazygit-return bin/new-tmux-session bin/tmux-sessionizer bin/tmux-lazygit
